title: How can I automatically track who completed a task?
excerpt: When a person sets Status of an Item to DONE I want to set “Completed By” Column to that person.  This is not a “Last Updated By” although close.

posts.author: mfriedma (Michael Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml: When a person sets Status of an Item to DONE I want to set “Completed By” Column to that person. This is not a “Last Updated By” although close.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
